# skill-stocktake

> A Claude Code skill (MIT) that audits all Claude skills and commands for quality. Uses a checklist plus AI holistic judgment to produce Keep / Improve / Update / Retire / Merge verdicts. Supports Quick Scan (changed-only, 5–10 min) and Full Stocktake (complete review, 20–30 min) modes.

## Core documentation

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): self-contained Q&A reference for AI agents (Project Facts, Prior Research, 9 question-form H2 sections)
- [README.md](README.md): human-facing narrative (install, modes, verdict criteria, requirements)
- [SKILL.md](skills/skill-stocktake/SKILL.md): full slash-command specification — scope, Quick Scan flow, Full Stocktake flow, evaluation rubric

## Architecture

- 5 verdicts: **Keep** (useful and current), **Improve** (worth keeping, specific fixes), **Update** (outdated tech reference), **Retire** (low quality / stale / cost-asymmetric), **Merge into X** (substantial overlap with another skill)
- 3 shell scripts: `scripts/scan.sh` (enumerate), `scripts/quick-diff.sh` (detect changes), `scripts/save-results.sh` (cache)
- Results cache: `~/.claude/skills/skill-stocktake/results.json`
- 4-phase Full Stocktake: Inventory → Quality Evaluation → Summary Table → Consolidation

## Standard reference

- [Agent Skill specification](https://agentskills.io/specification): the Claude Code skill format used by this repo
- [SkillsMP marketplace](https://agentskills.io/specification): one-step install via `/skills add`

## Sibling skills

- [llms-txt-writer](https://github.com/shimo4228/llms-txt-writer): writes AI-facing docs optimized for ChatGPT / Perplexity / Gemini citation
- [skill-comply](https://github.com/shimo4228/skill-comply): measures whether agents actually follow skill / rule definitions (v0.3.0)
- [context-sync](https://github.com/shimo4228/context-sync): audits and fixes project documentation roles
- [search-first](https://github.com/shimo4228/search-first): research-before-coding workflow
- [rules-distill](https://github.com/shimo4228/rules-distill): scan installed skills, extract cross-cutting principles, and distill them into rules
- [learn-eval](https://github.com/shimo4228/learn-eval): extract reusable patterns from sessions, self-evaluate quality, and save to the right location
- [daily-research](https://github.com/shimo4228/daily-research): cron-driven daily research digest — theme selection, multi-stage web research, LLM-as-Judge evaluation
